reference: Hi, and welcome to HCM. Only a biopsy can show for sure what it is, but usually, this is just a swollen lymph node due to a respiratory infection. However, if there is redness around it, or if it is fixed to the background or growing quickly, then you should visit a specialist. If this is soft and movable, then it can be a lymph node or lipoma. To be sure, you can do ultrasounds with a needle biopsy to see the exact cause. I wish you good health.
text: Hi and welcome to HCM. Only a biopsy can show for sure what it is, but usually it's just a swollen lymph node to a regular visit. However, if there's redness around it, or if it sticks to the background or grows in size, then you should visit a specialist. If the tissue soft and movable, then it can be a lymph node or a tumor. To be sure, we can do ultrasound to do a biopsy and see the exact cause. And you get good health.
